LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 7, 2016 AT 9:30 A.M., IN DEPT. 302. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS REQUIRED TO PROVIDE NOTICE TO THE DEFENDANT AND PROVIDE ANY CONTACT INFORMATION FOR THE DEFENDANT TO THE COURT CLERK. THE TENTATIVE RULING IS TO BE MAINTAINED. THE DEFENDANT IS TO BE INFORMED THAT IF THERE IS FAILURE TO APPEAR, THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION WILL BE DEEMED DENIED. JUDGE: JOSEPH QUINN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: GISELLE CASEY, CSR #8098. (302/JQ)

LAW AND MOTION, 302, JAN RAMOS' CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. FUNDS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,009.18 ARE TO BE RELEASED TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. THE COURT WILL PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. NOT REPORTED. (302/HK)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Dec-07-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

JAN RAMOS' CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is denied. Funds in the amount of $1,009.18 are to be released to the judgment creditor. The Court will prepare a form of order.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/HK)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Nov-23-2016 Continued To Dec-07-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court's tentative ruling reads "hearing required". PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is continued to December 7, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302. Plaintiff's Counsel is required to provide notice to the Defendant and provide any contact information for the Defendant to the Court Clerk. The tentative ruling is to be maintained. The Defendant is to be informed that if there is failure to appear, the claim of exemption will be deemed denied.

Judge: Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. (302/JQ)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2016 Off Calendar
